name: Budget-Home
description: Budget-Home is a self-hosted home budgeting application. It tracks income, expenses, and utility bills with PDF attachment support. Built on Node.js (Fastify) and React with PostgreSQL for storage.

notes.text: DB credentials and JWT secret are auto-generated on first install and stored in /opt/Budget-Home/apps/api/.env
To update an existing installation, run: bash /opt/Budget-Home/scripts/proxmox/install/budget-home-update.sh
